content: I will update the tab container's attributes in `CompanyDashboard.tsx` to enable HTML5 drag and drop and show responsive cursors and drag styles.

args.Description: "Enabling HTML5 drag and drop attributes and visual feedback for the stage tabs."
args.Instruction: "Add drag and drop handlers and cursor styling to the tab container element."
args.toolAction: "Adding drag-and-drop attributes to horizontal tabs layout"
